title: 11 Herbal Creams For Dermatitis
description: Plantago major creams contains the bioactive constituents aucubin and catalpol. Aucubin has anti-inflammatory properties, which help reduce redness and swelling associated with dermatitis. Catalpol has antioxidant properties, which protect the skin from damage caused by free radicals. The soothing and moisturizing properties of Plantago major creams also help to calm and hydrate the skin, making it a suitable treatment for dermatitis.
